title: zeta
description: Zeta excitation. Non-inverting fourth-order DC-DC converter — the dual of SEPIC: same gain M = D/(1-D), but the LC filter is on the OUTPUT side (so output-voltage ripple is small and there is no right-half-plane zero in CCM). The switch is HIGH-SIDE (PFET by default in the SPICE model). Two wiring variants are supported via the boolean flags below: V1 uncoupled (defaults; L1 magnetizing and L2 output filter are independent inductors) and V2 coupled-inductor (coupledInductor=true; L1 and L2 share one core, ripple-steering per TI SLYT411 — same condition as coupled-SEPIC because both inductors see identical voltages during both subintervals). Optional synchronousRectifier replaces the catch diode with a low-side MOSFET. The magnetic returned by process_design_requirements is L1 (or, when coupledInductor=true, a 2-winding coupled inductor). The remaining reactive elements (L2, Cc, Co) are emitted via get_extra_components_inputs.

inputVoltage.description: The input voltage of the Zeta

diodeVoltageDrop.description: The voltage drop on the rectifier diode (ignored when synchronousRectifier=true)

maximumSwitchCurrent.description: The maximum current that can go through the selected switch

currentRippleRatio.description: The maximum magnetizing-inductor (L1) current ripple ratio (delta-IL1 / IL1_avg)

synchronousRectifier.description: If true, the catch diode is replaced by an actively-driven low-side synchronous MOSFET. Reduces conduction loss; common at low Vout.

coupledInductor.description: If true, L1 and L2 are wound on the same core (1:1 coupled) with coupling coefficient couplingCoefficient. Ripple-steering per TI SLYT411 reduces input-current ripple. The magnetic returned is a 2-winding coupled inductor.

couplingCoefficient.description: Magnetic coupling coefficient k between L1 and L2 (used only when coupledInductor=true). Typical values 0.95-0.999.

zetaOperatingPoint.description: The description of one Zeta operating point. Zeta outputs are non-inverting (Vo positive).
zetaOperatingPoint.title: zetaOperatingPoint
